summary: User asked whether hallucinations are now eliminated and specifically about repeated-command loops. Clarified that risk is significantly reduced, not zero; explained loop detector upgrades, completion evidence gating, post-edit verification, stricter run-pr profile, and grounded compaction/memory safeguards; advised monitoring for repeated retries and further tightening if needed.
current_status: Core anti-hallucination hardening is implemented and validated; behavior should be much more grounded with fewer repetitive loops, though no system can guarantee zero hallucinations.
